description: Karaite ketubba draft on recto and verso. The ketubba begins on the recto at line 6. Date: 23 Shevat 5414 AM (1654 CE). Location: Cairo. The previously unmarried bride is Qamr bt. Avraham ha-Kohen and the groom's name is damaged beginning in l. 9: [Elʿaza]r(?) b. Moshe b. ____(?). MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
